root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch mainly cleans up redundant global test settings / refactors DDL tests (e.g., removing `GlobalInfoSyncerInit`, adjusting suite structure). The case evidence only shows a comment mentioning a potential data race, but without CI failure logs or a minimal repro it is not possible to confidently attribute the flakiness to a specific root cause category.
